name: default
description: Markdown sibling of the code-approaches exploration: title, context, a repeated approach block (name, code, pros, cons), and a recommendation. The agent renders the approaches array to repeated sections before substitution.

slots.description: Prompt or problem statement that motivated the exploration.
Approach name; the section heading. Repeat the approach block once per entry in the approaches array (see shape).
Representative code sketch for the approach.
Advantages of the approach, as a bullet list.
Drawbacks of the approach, as a bullet list.
Which approach to take and why.

shape.approach[]: { name: string, code: string, pros: string[], cons: string[] }
